metadata.name: Reroute Public Bus Due to Road Closure

description: An unplanned road closure requires an operator to reroute an in-service public bus and notify passengers.

nodes.task_description: Identify that 'Bus 42' is approaching a newly reported road closure.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent's dashboard shows an alert for the bus and the conflicting road closure.

nodes.task_description: Generate a detour route for Bus 42 to bypass the closure.
Push the new route to the bus driver's terminal and send an alert to the real-time transit app for passengers.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully sends the route and a public notification.
